generated_from: SOVAH active routines linked to product_catalog.json
global_ai_routing_rules: Prefer simple_routine if the customer asks for simple, starter, basic, quick, minimal, 2-step, few products or budget-friendly.
Prefer full_routine if the customer asks for complete, best, full, uitgebreide routine, complete set or everything they need.
If acne/pimples/breakouts are clearly mentioned, route acne higher than oily unless the message is only about shine/oil.
If sensitive/reactive/redness is clearly mentioned, be conservative and prefer Sensitive Skin Routine or Simple Sensitive Skin Routine.
Do not recommend SPF as part of a bundle, because SPF has intentionally been removed from bundle_products.

bundle_products.title: Hydrating Face Serum with Aloe & Hyaluronic Acid
Moisturising Day Face Cream with Hyaluronic Acid
Ceramide Barrier Night Cream for Dry & Normal Skin

ai_detection.routing_rule: Prefer simple_routine if the customer asks for simple, starter, basic, quick, minimal, 2-step, few products or budget-friendly. Prefer full_routine if the customer asks for complete, best, full, uitgebreid, everything they need, or does not ask for simple.
ai_detection.do_not_route_when: Do not route only on one overlapping word if the full message clearly points to another concern.

safety.manual_review_note: This routine contains one or more products with a catalog verification conflict.
